summary: Reverse pinch scrolling to match direct manipulation and project the hand skeleton plus pinch pointer onto the controlled webpage.
scope: move the page toward lower content when the pinched hand moves upward
draw a mirrored 21-point hand grid on the webpage
draw the thumb-index pinch midpoint as a yellow page-space pointer
notes: The projected grid is a local visual overlay and does not intercept page clicks.
The yellow point is a camera-to-viewport mapping, not a macOS mouse cursor.
